features.name: Readable brainstorming exports
features.description: Ensure brainstorming deliverables stay plain Markdown with no stray markup so they can be read directly without the agent.

features.name: Clean formatted transcript output
features.description: Remove odd code fences/markup from formatted transcript templates and outputs.

features.name: Deliverable filename conventions + renamer
features.description: Append deliverables with the raw transcript id and ship a script to rename existing files across projects (e.g., 2BUC0000HDWEB02_formatted_transcript.md).

features.name: Archive protocol automation
features.description: Archive raw transcripts immediately after processing; archive output folders after 15 days; add a daily archive check to the watch script startup. All requirements complete: transcript archival on processing, startup checks in visualizer, configurable age threshold.

features.name: Chat agent revision loop
features.description: Enforce the expected chat workflow: ingest user drafts (including screenshots), suggest relevant transcripts, produce Markdown revision reports, loop until approval, and trigger keyword/implementation reports when SEMRush data arrives.

features.name: Visualizer controls + roadmap alignment
features.description: Fix non-functional dashboard buttons and prioritize the roadmap from FUTURE_ENHANCEMENTS_VISUAL_DASHBOARD.md with the overhaul plan. Phase 1 (SQLite database backend) completed.

features.name: Per-model attribution and cost display
features.description: Sign output files with the agent/model used and expose per-model cost breakdowns in the dashboard visualizer. Complete: manifests track agent/model/backend per deliverable, session manager tracks per-model costs, visualizer displays Model Distribution panel.

features.name: Fix 'unknown program' visualizer regression
features.description: Investigate and fix the regression where the visualizer displays all program names as 'unknown program'. Investigation complete: program_type field is correctly populated in all manifests and get_program_name() function works correctly.
